name: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer
description: The product performs operations on a memory buffer without properly restricting read or write actions to the buffer's intended boundaries, potentially allowing memory corruption, arbitrary code execution, or information disclosure.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or TRANSFORM node provides size or index data that flows to a STORAGE[memory_buffer] node performing read/write operations without passing through a CONTROL node that validates bounds, length, or index range
